elements.text: You were recently diagnosed with HD and are aware of the challenges that lie ahead. The changing symptoms and unpredictable nature of your condition makes you question whether you will be able to provide the necessary care for your children. However, your family reminds you that you are not alone, and you feel...

elements.name: caring_for_children--presymptomatic--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: The more you immerse yourself in the story, the more likely you are to benefit from our program – really picture yourself in the situation at hand.
